welcome.title: Welcome to ClawSetup
welcome.description: One-click setup for OpenClaw with IM bot integration.
welcome.step3: Initialize OpenClaw and start the gateway

openclaw.title: OpenClaw CLI
openclaw.description: Install the OpenClaw CLI tool on your system.
openclaw.checkingCli: Checking if OpenClaw CLI is installed...
openclaw.installVerifyFailed: Installation completed but OpenClaw CLI was not detected. Check your PATH.

provider.title: AI Provider
provider.description: Choose your AI model provider and enter the API key.
provider.applyNote: ClawSetup will apply the selected endpoint during OpenClaw CLI setup.

verify.title: OpenClaw Onboarding
verify.description: Configure OpenClaw with your AI provider and start the local gateway.
verify.allCompleted: OpenClaw is ready locally. Open it in a new tab or continue to Feishu setup.
verify.noProviderSuggestion: Go back to Step 2 and select an AI provider.
verify.setupNeedsInstall: OpenClaw is not configured yet. Configuring it now.
verify.setupFailedSuggestion: Check your AI provider configuration and try again.
verify.onboardingNeedsSetup: Local OpenClaw is not configured yet. Starting onboarding now.
verify.resettingChannels: Resetting channels configuration for fresh setup...
verify.channelsReset: Channels configuration cleared. Ready for reconfiguration.
verify.onboardingFailedSuggestion: Check your API key and try again.
verify.pluginFailedSuggestion: Check network connection and try again.
verify.verifyFailedSuggestion: Check the failed items and retry.
verify.gatewayReady: Dashboard is ready for local chat

feishu.title: Feishu Setup
feishu.description: Connect Feishu when you are ready. This step is optional, but Pairing Code approval is required before your private chat can talk to OpenClaw.
feishu.step1Desc: We only need App ID and App Secret for the current WebSocket setup.
feishu.appIdMinLength: App ID must be at least 4 characters
feishu.appSecretMinLength: App Secret must be at least 6 characters
feishu.step2Title: Step 2. Paste the Pairing Code from Feishu
feishu.step2Desc: Go to Feishu, open a private chat with the bot, send any message, then paste the Pairing Code you receive here.
feishu.pairingCodeMinLength: Enter the Pairing Code from Feishu
feishu.pendingCode: Latest pending code detected in OpenClaw: {code}
feishu.waitingForMessage: Waiting for you to send a message to the bot in Feishu...
feishu.connectedMessage: Feishu connected. Go to Feishu, send any message to the bot, then paste the Pairing Code here.
feishu.alreadyConnected: Feishu is already connected. Send any message to the bot in Feishu to get your Pairing Code.

done.title: Setup Complete
done.description: OpenClaw is configured and ready to use. You can connect IM channels now or come back later.
done.allSetDesc: Your OpenClaw gateway is running. Open the OpenClaw Dashboard to chat locally, or come back later to connect Feishu and other IM channels.
done.feishuDescription: Feishu is connected and ready. Your private chat can now talk directly to OpenClaw.
done.feishuDesc: 🦞 Configuration complete, Have fun! Ernest wishes you a great time~
done.localOnlyDescription: OpenClaw is configured locally. You can connect Feishu and other IM channels later.
